log.why: Structured scaling is the future machine-readable companion to Higher Levels prose.
Runtime higherLevelScaling must be backed by numbered structured scaling rules, not only by copied Higher Levels prose.

fields.comment: Runtime higherLevelScaling must be backed by numbered structured scaling rules, not only by copied Higher Levels prose. It maps to `higherLevelScaling`. It is populated from the structured markdown label `Higher Levels`. Purpose: higherLevelScaling exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about this mechanic. Populate it from the structured markdown field `Higher Levels`, after that field has been checked against canonical prose. It maps to runtime JSON path `higherLevelScaling`. The value type is `object`. This is optional or conditional in the runtime shape. Omit or leave empty only when this runtime/template layer intentionally treats the field as optional.

Stores repeated-cast, recast-maintenance, and full-concentration rules that change a spell's duration or permanence. Purpose: durationProgression exists so canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON do not silently disagree about permanence or duration-extension mechanics. Populate it from the structured duration-progression labels after canonical prose review. It maps to runtime JSON path `durationProgression`. Omit or leave empty only when the spell has no duration-progression mechanic.
